dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.depositNote: This is demo funding — no real payment is processed. It runs a real UPDATE on your balance in PostgreSQL.

meters.title: Smart Meters
meters.anomalyHint: Tip: a temperature above 80°C or any error code fires the trg_DetectarAnomalias trigger and flips this meter to MAINTENANCE — try it.
meters.anomalyTriggered: Anomaly detected by the database trigger — meter moved to MAINTENANCE
meters.partitionHit: Partition pruning: this range only scanned {partitions}
meters.rangeCapped: Range capped at 3 months to keep queries reasonable

internals.title: DB Internals
internals.intro: This panel deliberately exposes the database machinery that powers VoltExchange — range partitioning, triggers, and stored procedures. There is no role system: any authenticated user can view it. That's intentional; this project is a PostgreSQL showcase.
internals.anomaliesBlurb: An AFTER INSERT trigger on Leituras inspects the JSONB audit payload of every reading. Temperature above 80°C or any error code flips the meter to MAINTENANCE — no application code involved.
internals.matchingBlurb: sp_MatchingEngine pairs pending buy orders with active sell offers — FIFO by order age, best price first, region-aware, with partial fills across multiple offers. Statement-level triggers run it automatically after every new offer or order.
internals.quarantineBlurb: sp_QuarentenaUtilizador puts all of a user's meters into MAINTENANCE and cancels their active offers in a single transaction — the kind of admin action that belongs in the database when consistency matters.
internals.quarantineConfirm: Quarantine {name}? Their meters go to MAINTENANCE and active offers are cancelled.
internals.quarantineDone: User quarantined — meters in MAINTENANCE, offers cancelled
internals.partitionsBlurb: Leituras holds ~500k rows split across 24 monthly partitions (Leituras_2025_01 … Leituras_2026_12). Date-range queries prune to just the partitions they need — try it on the Meters page.
internals.transactionsBlurb: Every settled trade, whether DIRETA (direct buy) or MATCHED (matching engine). The buyer≠seller CHECK and the balance transfer both live in the database.
